title: eriogonum brevicaule var. cottamii
intro: Eriogonum brevicaule var. cottamii, also known as Cottam's buckwheat clover or short-flowered buckwheat, is a plant species within the Eriogonum genus. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum brevicaule var. cottamii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and it is often used topically to aid in wound care and skin health.
